scene.message: A sweet, drowsy scent{nl} drifts from beyond the door.{waitkey}{ret}
Enter the Tower of Hypnos?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Yukino: Tch! Quit flirting{nl} in broad daylight!{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Still going at it?{nl} Those two never get bored.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: What is Ayase{nl} trying to say?{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: I can see myself{nl} in your eyeballs.{waitkey}You{wait_fr:30}... don't tell me...!!{waitkey}{ret}
